title: grammitis sclerophylla
intro: Grammitis sclerophylla, also known as the scrub fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Grammitidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Grammitis sclerophylla include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
